differential_diagnoses: Diffuse alveolar hemorrhage due to vasculitis (e.g., ANCA-associated)
Dengue fever with capillary leak syndrome
next_steps: Perform bronchoalveolar lavage for cytology, galactomannan, and pathogen-specific PCR
Review peripheral blood smear for atypical lymphocytes
Conduct echocardiogram (formal) to definitively exclude occult cardiac dysfunction
Initiate broad-spectrum antimicrobial coverage including specific agents for suspected Hantavirus or Leptospirosis as clinical suspicion warrants
